assignments.twist: stationary nonlinear Schrodinger standing wave gauge-coupled to a Chern-Simons field, solved for a normalized ground state with supercritical exponential nonlinearity

core_model_summary: Existence of an L2-normalized ground-state standing wave for a Chern-Simons-Schrodinger system: a nonlinear Schrodinger equation coupled to a planar gauge field.
